text.title: Nginx Configuration Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: PCI scan flags the host; modern browsers warn on connection; downgrade attacks possible.
antipattern.root-cause: Config copied from an older site that still listed `ssl_protocols TLSv1 TLSv1.1 TLSv1.2;` and never updated.
antipattern.fix: Replace ssl_protocols line with `ssl_protocols TLSv1.2 TLSv1.3;` and reload. Verify with `testssl.sh` or SSL Labs.

antipattern.symptom: Browsers accept downgrade on first visit; MITM can intercept on public Wi-Fi before HSTS upgrade.
antipattern.root-cause: Author forgot the header or thought TLS alone was enough.
antipattern.fix: Add `add_header Strict-Transport-Security "max-age=63072000; includeSubDomains; preload" always;` to security-headers snippet and include in every HTTPS server block.

antipattern.symptom: Latency spikes under load; only one CPU core utilised; load tests fall over at <1k RPS.
antipattern.root-cause: Default `worker_processes 1;` left in place; admin assumed nginx scales automatically.
antipattern.fix: Set `worker_processes auto;` (or pin to physical core count) and `worker_connections 4096+`.

antipattern.symptom: Backend logs all requests as coming from nginx IP; Django ALLOWED_HOSTS rejects requests; CSRF / OAuth callbacks break.
antipattern.root-cause: Author wrote `proxy_pass http://backend;` without `include /etc/nginx/snippets/proxy-params.conf;` setting Host / X-Forwarded-*.
antipattern.fix: Add the proxy-params include with `proxy_set_header Host $host; proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for; proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;`.
